results.question: For each patent, count how many outgoing citations it has, considering only utility patents filed after 2000.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?patent (COUNT(DISTINCT ?citation) AS ?citationCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-patentsview> WHERE {
  ?patent <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Patent> .
  ?patent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/has_outgoing_citation> ?citation .
  ?citation <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Citation> .
  ?patent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/patent_type> "utility" .
  ?patent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/patent_date> ?date .
  FILTER(?date > "2000-01-01")
} GROUP BY ?patent ORDER BY DESC(?citationCount) LIMIT 10

per_seed.sql: SELECT T1."patent_id", COUNT(T2."citation_patent_id") FROM "Patent" AS T1 JOIN "Citation" AS T2 ON T1."patent_id" = T2."patent_id" WHERE T1."patent_type" = 'utility' AND T1."patent_date" > '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T1."patent_id";

results.question: List inventors and the number of patents they are associated with, focusing only on inventors whose last name contains 'Smith'.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?inventor (COUNT(DISTINCT ?patent) AS ?patentCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-patentsview> WHERE {
  ?inventor <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Inventor> .
  ?patent <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Patent> .
  ?patent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/has_inventor> ?inventor .
  ?inventor <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/disambig_inventor_name_last> ?lastName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?lastName, "Smith"))
} GROUP BY ?inventor ORDER BY DESC(?patentCount) LIMIT 10

per_seed.sql: SELECT "disambig_inventor_name_first", "disambig_inventor_name_last", COUNT("patent_id") FROM "Inventor" WHERE "disambig_inventor_name_last" LIKE '%Smith%' GROUP BY "inventor_id";
all_sql_attempts: SELECT "disambig_inventor_name_first", "disambig_inventor_name_last", COUNT("patent_id") FROM "Inventor" WHERE "disambig_inventor_name_last" LIKE '%Smith%' GROUP BY "inventor_id";

results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?patent ?title (COUNT(DISTINCT ?citation) AS ?citationCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-patentsview> WHERE {
  ?citation <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Citation> .
  ?citation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/citation_targets_patent> ?patent .
  ?patent <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/type/Patent> .
  ?patent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-patentsview/pred/patent_title> ?title .
}
GROUP BY ?patent ?title
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?citation) >= 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?citationCount)
LIMIT 10

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Patent: 100000 rows (from Patent.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Patent" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER,
  "patent_type" TEXT,
  "patent_date" TEXT,
  "patent_title" TEXT,
  "wipo_kind" TEXT,
  "num_claims" INTEGER,
  "withdrawn" INTEGER,
  "filename" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Patent:
--   patent_id='10000000', patent_type='utility', patent_date='2018-06-19', patent_title='Coherent LADAR using intra-pixel quadrat', wipo_kind='B2', num_claims='20', withdrawn='0', filename='ipg180619.xml'
--   patent_id='10000001', patent_type='utility', patent_date='2018-06-19', patent_title='Injection molding machine and mold thick', wipo_kind='B2', num_claims='12', withdrawn='0', filename='ipg180619.xml'

-- Table Inventor: 100000 rows (from Inventor.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Inventor" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER,
  "inventor_sequence" INTEGER,
  "inventor_id" TEXT,
  "disambig_inventor_name_first" TEXT,
  "disambig_inventor_name_last" TEXT,
  "gender_code" TEXT,
  "location_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Inventor:
--   patent_id='D1006496', inventor_sequence='0', inventor_id='fl:we_ln:jiang-149', disambig_inventor_name_first='Wenjing', disambig_inventor_name_last='Jiang', gender_code='F', location_id='9d072d42-49af-11ed-9879-1234bde3cd05'
--   patent_id='12029253', inventor_sequence='4', inventor_id='fl:ei_ln:baumker-1', disambig_inventor_name_first='Eiko', disambig_inventor_name_last='BÄUMKER', gender_code='M', location_id='67149e17-49af-11ed-9879-1234bde3cd05'

-- Table Assignee: 100000 rows (from Assignee.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Assignee" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER,
  "assignee_sequence" INTEGER,
  "assignee_id" TEXT,
  "disambig_assignee_individual_name_first" TEXT,
  "disambig_assignee_individual_name_last" TEXT,
  "disambig_assignee_organization" TEXT,
  "assignee_type" REAL,
  "location_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Assignee:
--   patent_id='4488683', assignee_sequence='0', assignee_id='1ea59611-1100-41e1-8805-48bb4d364f0a', disambig_assignee_individual_name_first='', disambig_assignee_individual_name_last='', disambig_assignee_organization='Metal Works Ramat David', assignee_type='3.0', location_id='50dc5d46-16c8-11ed-9b5f-1234bde3cd05'
--   patent_id='11872626', assignee_sequence='0', assignee_id='a697843f-fe51-4800-be08-e9ea92ffe21d', disambig_assignee_individual_name_first='', disambig_assignee_individual_name_last='', disambig_assignee_organization='Divergent Technologies, Inc.', assignee_type='2.0', location_id='15c69712-16c8-11ed-9b5f-1234bde3cd05'

-- Table CPCClass: 100000 rows (from CPCClass.csv)
CREATE TABLE "CPCClass" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER,
  "cpc_sequence" INTEGER,
  "cpc_section" TEXT,
  "cpc_class" TEXT,
  "cpc_subclass" TEXT,
  "cpc_group" TEXT,
  "cpc_type" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from CPCClass:
--   patent_id='3950000', cpc_sequence='0', cpc_section='A', cpc_class='A63', cpc_subclass='A63C', cpc_group='A63C9/001', cpc_type='inventional'
--   patent_id='3950000', cpc_sequence='1', cpc_section='A', cpc_class='A63', cpc_subclass='A63C', cpc_group='A63C9/00', cpc_type='inventional'

-- Table Citation: 100000 rows (from Citation.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Citation" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER,
  "citation_sequence" INTEGER,
  "citation_patent_id" INTEGER,
  "citation_date" TEXT,
  "record_name" TEXT,
  "wipo_kind" TEXT,
  "citation_category" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Citation:
--   patent_id='10000000', citation_sequence='0', citation_patent_id='5093563', citation_date='1992-03-01', record_name='Small', wipo_kind='A', citation_category='cited by examiner'
--   patent_id='10000000', citation_sequence='1', citation_patent_id='5751830', citation_date='1998-05-01', record_name='Hutchinson', wipo_kind='A', citation_category='cited by applicant'

-- Table Location: 99613 rows (from Location.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Location" (
  "location_id" TEXT,
  "disambig_city" TEXT,
  "disambig_state" TEXT,
  "disambig_country" TEXT,
  "latitude" REAL,
  "longitude" REAL,
  "county" TEXT,
  "state_fips" REAL,
  "county_fips" REAL
);
-- sample rows from Location:
--   location_id='00235947-16c8-11ed-9b5f-1234bde3cd05', disambig_city='Westfield', disambig_state='PA', disambig_country='US', latitude='41.9192368', longitude='-77.5388744', county='Tioga', state_fips='42.0', county_fips='117.0'
--   location_id='00236a27-16c8-11ed-9b5f-1234bde3cd05', disambig_city='Helfenstein', disambig_state='PA', disambig_country='US', latitude='40.7504993', longitude='-76.4473336', county='Schuylkill County', state_fips='42.0', county_fips='107.0'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Assignee.col -> Location.col
--   CPCClass.col -> Patent.col
--   Citation.col -> Patent.col
--   Inventor.col -> Location.col
--   Patent.col -> Assignee.col
--   Patent.col -> CPCClass.col
--   Patent.col -> Citation.col
--   Patent.col -> Inventor.col
